description: Testing the visual display and functionality of the forgot password link.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Check default display of Forgot password link
+ Click Forgot password link
expected_result:
+ Position, text, text color of Forgot password link ... display as designed
+ Forgot password screen displays successfully

item_type: Check input email address into Forgot password screen
description: Testing email validation and processing for password reset requests.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Input valid email that thas been registered
+ Normal email value
+ Has spaces at the beginning/at the end of Email value
expected_result:
+ Not display any error
+ Has successful message
+ The email has sent to the mail to which the user has provided

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Input invalid email
+ Blank
+ Lack "@" in Email
+ Redundant "@" in Email
+ Has ".." in Email
+ Has "." at the end of Email
+ Has "." at the end of local part
+ Has "@" at the end of Email
+ Has "-" after "@"
+ Local part is NULL
+ Domain part is NULL
+ Input SQL injection
+ Input HTML (Scripts)
+ Local > Max value (64 characters)
+ Domain part > Max value (255 characters)
+ Include invalid character 
+ Include unicode character
+ Include half-width characters
+ Include full-width characters
expected_result: - Display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Input valid email that
+ Unregistered email
+ Blocked email
+ Email has not been activated yet
+ Email address has been deleted
(email exist in database with status: deleted)
expected_result: Forgot password email is not sent

test_view_points.viewpoint: Email address: Role of this user is permitted to set new password when forgot
expected_result:
+ Not display any error
+ Has successful message
+ The email has sent to the mail to which the user has provided

test_view_points.viewpoint: Email address: Role of this user is not permitted to set new password when forgot
expected_result: - Display error message

description: Testing multiple password reset requests and link activation behavior.

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click Forgot password link 1 time and send 1 Forgot password email
expected_result:
- Link at email will be active
- Can set new password successfully
- Can login with new password successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Click Forgot password link 3 times and send 3 Forgot password emails with the same receiver
(receiver not click any links)
expected_result: The link at the last email is active, other links are inactive

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click Forgot password link 3 times and send 3 Forgot password emails with different receivers
expected_result:
3 links at 3 emails will be active
Can set new password successfully

item_type: Check Forgot password email when email includes new password
description: Testing password reset email content and functionality when new password is included.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check title, content, layout of email
expected_result:
- Email displays as spec:Title,  Content email, Format
+ Can login with provided password 
+ Cannot login with old password

item_type: Check Forgot password with reset link
description: Testing reset link functionality and edge cases.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check title, content, layout of email
expected_result: - Email displays as spec:Title,  Content email, Format

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Not click link in email
+ Click link but not set new password
expected_result: Can login with old password

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click link in email and set new password
expected_result:
Can not login with old password
Can login with new password

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click on reset link many times
expected_result: Reset password screen displays successfully when click

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click on reset link when time is exceeded
expected_result: - Display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click on reset link when user has clicked that link before and changed password already
expected_result: - Display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Click on reset link in tab 1 while user is logging in tab 2 of the same browser
+ Reset new password in tab 1
+ Refresh tab 2
expected_result:
+ Can set new password successfully in tab 1
+ When refresh tab 2, it redirects to correct screen as spec Ex: Home page

test_view_points.viewpoint: + Click on reset link and change token to incorrect token
expected_result: - Display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Open mail box 
+ Click on reset link to open Set new password screen in new tab
+ After that sign out mail
+ Refresh browser of Set new password screen
expected_result:
+ Set new password screen is unchanged
+ Can set new password successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
+ Click on reset link and logout present email, login another email
+ Refresh browser of reset link
expected_result: - Display error message

description: Testing the new password setting interface, validation of password requirements, and password field behavior.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default display of Set new password screen
expected_result: + Position, text, text color, place holder of Set new password screen ... display as designed

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Use below Character and input the same value into Password and Confirm field
+ Alphabet Letter
+ Number
+ Both Uppercase and LowerCase
+ Special Character (!@#$%^&*()_+....)
+ Space character
+ Equal to Min value
+ Between Min and Max value
+ Equal to Max value
+ Password is the same with Account 
+ Password is the same with old password
+ Copy/Paste data into Password field
expected_result:
New password is set successfully
Redirect to correct screen after set new password (Ex: Homepage)

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Use below Character and input the same value into Password and Confirm field
+ Input SQL injection 
+ Input HTML (Scripts)
expected_result:
- Not show system error
- Reset password successfully If SQL injection string/HTML is mapped with requirement of password
- Display correct error message and Not process any thing If SQL injection string/HTML is not mapped with requirement of password

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Use below Character and input different value into Password and Confirm field
+ Alphabet Letter
+ Number
+ Both Uppercase and LowerCase
+ Special Character (!@#$%^&*()_+....)
+ Space character
+ Equal to Min value
+ Between Min and Max value
+ Equal to Max value
expected_result: - Display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint:
1. Use below Character in one field: Password or Confirm field
+ Blank 
+ Less than Min value
+ More than Max value
+ Use Japanese Character
+ Not contains any require characters

2. Another field is set with valid value
expected_result: - Display error message

test_view_points.viewpoint: Copy Password and paste into Confirm field
expected_result: Can not copy/paste value from Password field, Confirm Password field value is still empty

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check password when displays as hidden
expected_result: Password is hidden by special Character

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check password when click on Eye button
expected_result: Display correctly value of password

description: Testing login functionality with new and old passwords after password reset.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Input new password
expected_result: Can login with new password

test_view_points.viewpoint: Input old password
expected_result: - Display error message
